canonical_owner: Configuración owns global system settings, module enablement, company/branch administration, permissions administration, SMTP/payment-provider settings, monthly closing settings, Happy Hour rule administration, hardware settings entrypoints, and UI/theme preferences.

shared_dependencies.configuration_scope: Shared configuration repository consumed by WhatsApp-specific panels and credentials; Configuración may expose navigation but must not own WhatsApp business rules.
Ticket layout and print-template configuration belongs to Tickets; Configuración only owns official business identity values consumed by ticket rendering.
Loyalty program settings belong to Fidelidad even if persisted in configuraciones.
Shift notification settings belong to RRHH even if persisted in configuraciones.

owned_capabilities: General settings readiness and key/value persistence through SystemSettingsService and ConfigRepository.
Module enablement toggles through ModuleSettingsService and core/module_config.py.
Company profile, branches and delivery profile administration through CompanyProfileService.
SMTP, Mercado Pago and security setting forms through SettingsApplicationService, EmailSettingsService and PaymentProviderSettingsService.
Happy Hour rule administration through HappyHourSettingsService while pricing execution remains outside Configuración.
User, role and permission administration through UserManagementService, RoleManagementService, PermissionQueryService and ModuleAccessService.
Hardware setup UI and canonical hardware config repository/query services for devices consumed by other modules.
Theme/UI preferences and module availability UI.

scope_findings.description: ConfigRepository is the remaining SQL boundary for Configuración; direct SQL in PyQt is not part of the accepted scope.
Identity issues such as int branch ids, uuid4 operation ids and lastrowid returns are in scope but assigned to CONFIGURACION-02-IDENTITY.
Commit/rollback ownership and repository transaction boundaries are in scope but assigned to CONFIGURACION-08-TRANSACTIONS.

out_of_scope_candidates: WhatsApp-specific credentials, webhook diagnostics and AI intent settings beyond shared configuration keys.
Ticket template design and print layout editing beyond official company identity values.
Loyalty and birthday/referral program rules beyond generic settings storage.
RRHH shift-notification content beyond generic settings storage.
